name: UNIVERSAL SAFETY PRODUCTS, INC.
business: The Company designs and markets safety products, primarily smoke alarms and carbon monoxide alarms, and also markets electrical products through its subsidiary. In May 2025, it sold the smoke and carbon monoxide alarm portion of its business and now continues importing and marketing other product lines. Additionally, in July 2025, it formed Universal DeFi LLC to pursue a tokenization platform and node/validator operations on the Ault Blockchain.
sellsTo: retailers including wholesale distributors, chain, discount, television retailers and home center stores, catalog and mail order companies
electrical distribution trade (electrical and lighting distributors and manufactured housing companies)

exposures.sentence: Universal DeFi is developing and intends to own and operate a tokenization platform.
Universal DeFi has acquired and commenced limited operations running licensed nodes and a validator on the Ault Blockchain.

catalysts.sentence: On May 22, 2025, we closed on the asset sale to Feit pursuant to the terms of the Asset Purchase Agreement.
In July 2025, we formed a wholly owned subsidiary called Universal DeFi LLC

catalysts.event: Node revenue sharing agreement entered into
catalysts.sentence: On June 30, 2026, Universal DeFi entered into a node revenue sharing agreement (the Revenue Sharing Agreement) with Ault Capital Group, Inc.

catalysts.event: Convertible note purchase agreement entered into
catalysts.sentence: In June 2026, we entered into a securities purchase agreement to sell up to $10 million of convertible notes, of which $1.0 million has been funded to date.
